trendOverride.reason: No trend override: quality 88/88, trend 68/100, sentiment neutral.

authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

review.notes: The article provides a clear, practical guide to building AI workflows with memory for logistics use cases. The content is well-researched and provides actionable steps. However, the article could benefit from more detailed examples of prompt engineering for the AI classification step, and a deeper explanation of how the 'memory' is technically implemented in the workflow. The article also assumes a certain level of technical know-how from the reader, which may not suit all in the target audience.
recommendedFixes: Add a brief explanation or example of the prompt engineering involved in the AI triage step
Include a short technical explanation of how to implement memory using Notion or Airtable in the workflow
Optionally, add a section on how to handle rate limits and API failures with the AI API
Add a sentence or two on how to secure the API keys and manage the data in the Notion or Airtable base for beginners
Include a brief mention of how to handle data privacy, especially when using 3rd party tools like Notion and Make.com
